mnemonics: Davie is DAVE: Differentiated Architecture Virtually Everywhere
keyPoints: A framework for providing Quality of Service (QoS) in IP networks.
Uses the concept of flow aggregates and per-hop behaviors (PHBs).
Designed to be more scalable than per-flow management like Integrated Services.
commonMistakes: Confusing Davie (Differentiated Services) with the similar-sounding Integrated Services (IntServ) architecture.
Thinking DiffServ provides hard guarantees (it provides soft, probabilistic guarantees).
Assuming it manages individual flows (it manages classes of traffic or aggregates).
